headline: A Look At PNC Financial Services Group’s Valuation Relative To Its Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: Why PNC Financial Services Group is on investors’ radar PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) is drawing attention after recent share performance data, with the stock last closing at US$220.71 and showing mixed short term returns over the past week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for PNC Financial Services Group. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 4.3% year to date share price return and a 37.8% 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting earlier momentum is being tested...
